title: Foo Bar Stream Schema Evolution
description: Fix a broken Redpanda topic schema: add a new optional field to the event schema while maintaining backward compatibility for existing consumers.

tasks.description: Add region field to orders topic schema and ensure consumers handle both old and new message formats

infrastructure.description: Redpanda running with orders topic containing events (order_id, customer_id, amount). Schema is missing region field; consumers fail on new format.
